# your-harness Harness — opinionated Claude Code + Codex starter / meta-harness

## What this repo is
A governance harness for Claude Code + Codex CLI workflows. Deterministic-gate enforcement,
single-cursor continuation loop, TDD ledger, fleet management tooling. Human-in-the-loop;
no autonomous self-continuation.

## Key docs
- CLAUDE.md — primary instruction surface (coding rules, hook policy, role policy, language)
- AGENTS.md — Codex-side counterpart (generated from CLAUDE.md)
- ARCHITECTURE.md — runtime surfaces map
- docs/decisions/ — ADRs (governance decisions, e.g. ADR-50 memory-DB, ADR-51 harness-consistency)
- docs/harness-engineering/applications/design-process.md — design workflow (5-step gate)
- docs/INDEX.md — doc navigation index

## Memory
Canonical store: .mir/memory.db (SQLite + FTS5 + sqlite-vec)
Query: uv run mir memory query <keyword>
Projections (do not hand-edit): docs/memory-map.md, tasks/lessons.md

## Build / test
uv run pytest          — full test suite (tools/ + tests/)
uv run ruff check      — lint
uv run mir --help      — CLI entrypoint

## Session start
Read tasks/plan.md cursor first. Run: uv run mir loop next --json
One bounded step per pass through the Codex delegated lane.
